known_facts: SNN Critical path was the adder chain inside the neuron.
Pipelining the neuron solved the timing violation.
System Decision Latency is exactly 6 cycles.
unknown_facts: How to train the SNN weights.
current_architecture: Pipelined SNN Coprocessor + Cuckoo Datapath + Payload Delay Line.

engineering_debt.Control Plane Debt: No AXI-Lite interface to manage rules or weights.

next_objectives: Wrap up the prototype for final presentation.
